title: stelis peruviana
intro: Stelis peruviana, also known as the Peruvian stelis, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, known for its unique and delicate appearance. Traditionally, Stelis peruviana has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include the potential treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Stelis peruviana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to make ointments and salves.
